metadata.title: Imagen 4 - AI Image Generator & Editor | Marble AI
metadata.description: Google Imagen 4 by DeepMind. State-of-the-art text-to-image generation model with photorealistic, high-quality visuals and exceptional detail. Supports both text-to-image and image-to-image.

hero.title: Imagen 4
hero.description: Google DeepMind's state-of-the-art image generation model. Transform prompts into photorealistic, high-quality visuals with exceptional detail and creative versatility.

introduce.title: About Imagen 4
introduce.label: Model Overview
introduce.description: Google Imagen 4, developed by Google DeepMind and introduced at Google I/O 2025, is a state-of-the-art text-to-image generation model ideal for commercial, marketing, design, and creative applications.

items.title: Photorealistic Quality
items.description: Generate stunning photorealistic images with exceptional detail, natural lighting, and realistic textures.

items.title: Creative Versatility
items.description: Support for diverse artistic styles and creative directions for various applications.

items.title: High Resolution
items.description: Produce high-resolution images suitable for commercial and professional use.

items.title: Fast Generation
items.description: Optimized inference for quick image generation without compromising quality.

features.title: Key Features
features.description: Discover what makes Imagen 4 a leading image generation model.

items.title: Dual Generation Modes
items.description: Supports both text-to-image generation and image-to-image editing for comprehensive workflows.

items.title: Exceptional Detail
items.description: Industry-leading detail rendering for professional-quality output.

items.title: Style Control
items.description: Extensive style control options for diverse artistic directions.

items.title: Prompt Understanding
items.description: Advanced prompt comprehension for accurate image generation from descriptions.

items.title: API Integration
items.description: Seamless API access for developers to integrate into applications.

items.title: Commercial License
items.description: Full commercial rights for all generated and edited images.

use-cases.title: Use Cases
use-cases.description: Explore the diverse applications of Imagen 4.

items.title: Commercial Marketing
items.description: Create professional marketing visuals, advertisements, and promotional materials.

items.title: Product Design
items.description: Generate product concepts, mockups, and visualizations for design projects.

items.title: Creative Art
items.description: Produce stunning digital artwork and creative illustrations.

items.title: E-commerce

items.title: Brand Identity

items.title: What is Imagen 4?
items.description: Imagen 4 is Google DeepMind's state-of-the-art text-to-image generation model, introduced at Google I/O 2025, known for photorealistic quality and creative versatility.

items.title: What generation modes does it support?
items.description: Imagen 4 supports both Text To Image (generating images from text descriptions) and Image To Image (editing and transforming existing images).

items.title: What makes Imagen 4 special?
items.description: Imagen 4 delivers exceptional photorealistic quality, creative versatility, and advanced prompt understanding for professional-grade image generation.

items.title: Is there an enhanced version?
items.description: Yes, Google Imagen 4 Ultra delivers even greater precision, speed, and resolution for demanding applications.

items.title: Can I use it commercially?
items.description: Yes! All images generated or edited with Imagen 4 through Marble AI come with full commercial rights.

items.title: What applications is it best for?
items.description: Imagen 4 is ideal for commercial, marketing, design, and creative applications requiring high-quality visuals.

cta.title: Ready to Try Imagen 4?
cta.description: Experience Google DeepMind's state-of-the-art image generation. Create photorealistic visuals with exceptional detail.
